title: DeepSeek V3 excels at financial modeling
content: DeepSeek V3 demonstrates superior performance on HK market financial modeling tasks compared to GPT-4 Turbo, with 23% better accuracy on currency hedging scenarios
evidence: 20-task benchmark on HK gold price predictions

title: Qwen 2.5 superior at traditional Chinese
content: Qwen 2.5 models show native-level fluency in traditional Chinese (繁體中文) for Hong Kong context, outperforming Claude on financial terminology and local idioms

title: Llama 4 struggles with API key formatting
content: Llama 4 consistently formats API keys incorrectly when generating example code, often adding invalid characters or incorrect prefix patterns
evidence: 15/20 code generation tasks included malformed API key examples

title: GLM 5.1 Best Open-Weight Model
content: GLM 5.1 is best open-weight for agentic coding April 2026. Beats Claude Opus 4.6 on SWE-Bench Pro 58.4 vs 57.3. 198K context, tools+thinking. Available via Ollama Max 100usd/mo.

title: Ollama Cloud Provider Hardening (2026-04-10): Fixed 503 Service Unavailable cras
content: Ollama Cloud Provider Hardening (2026-04-10): Fixed 503 Service Unavailable crashes by adding exponential backoff retry for transient HTTP errors (429/502/503). Added native /api/chat as fallback endpoint when /v1/chat/completions fails. Native API supports think parameter (maps from reasoning_effort), options.num_predict, and richer response metrics. Dynamic timeout: 30s for economy models, 180s for premium. Provider now survives cloud overload gracefully.
